Localization.Description: An extremely high frequency of DNS requests with the TXT record type from a host in a short period of time may indicate the use of the Do-exfiltration utility

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Multiple TXT requests from host {src.host} on DNS server {event_src.host}. Number of requests detected in a minute: {numfield1}. This may indicate the use of the Do-exfiltration utility.
